expectations.text: Continues from the late-stage pricing-plan context instead of reopening discovery from scratch
expectations.evidence: The baseline continues directly from the existing pricing-plan conversation and performs a late-stage closeout review instead of restarting intake.

expectations.text: Performs a review that separates confirmed pricing rules from unresolved but non-blocking commercial boundaries
expectations.evidence: It lists the confirmed pricing scope and rules first, then isolates the unresolved commercial items as non-blocking pending decisions or default assumptions.

expectations.text: Asks for explicit generation authorization now instead of requiring approval of several default pricing decisions first
expectations.evidence: It explicitly asks whether to generate the next version now after surfacing the unresolved items, instead of making the user settle them all first.

eval_feedback.overall: Manual grading for iteration-15 based on response.txt.
